'''''Blue Ruin''''' was a [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] belonging to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It responded to a distress call from an Imperial troop convoy that was under attack by Rebel [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighters]], [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|RZ-1 A-wing interceptors]], [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighters]] and [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighters]] in the [[Mylok system/Legends|Mylok system]]. The convoy was under escort from [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wings]] belonging to [[Talon Squadron (Galactic Empire)|Talon Squadron]] itself, but was outnumbered, so the frigate called for reinforcements from [[Avenger Squadron]], in the form of [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avengers]].

{{Ship-stub}}
